creator: chris@thil.de
text:
Exim 4.63 is build with Support for: crypteq iconv() IPv6 use_setclassresources PAM Perl OpenSSL Content_Scanning Old_Demime Experimental_SPF Experimental_SRS

Library versions are libspf2-1.2.5_1 and libsrs_alt-1.0.r1.a

When doing SPF queries using the configuration file options

    deny message = SPF Failure
        spf = fail
        log_message  = ACL reject: SPF denied sending host
    warn message = $spf_received

exim crashes with
    exim child xyz ended: status=0xb

How-To-Repeat: Submit a mail message using a spf enabled sending address (tried it with @thil.de, @gmx.de) with exim.
